name: Animus
description: Shamans who follow the Path of Animus embody hunger, drive, and unraveling others to feed their own momentum, gaining access to spheres such as Mortification and Aberration. (Confirmed: old role-text name 'Conduit' maps to Animus.)

feats.name: Caustic Failure
feats.description: Inflict a Curse bond on a target, causing atrophy. The target gains Weakened 2, and all attacks against it deal an additional 1d4 Corrosive. Cost: 1 Vessel charge.

feats.name: Ruinous Spike
feats.description: If a target within range has a Curse, grant them Weakness to one Physical damage type of your choice.

feats.name: Hollowing Curse
feats.description: Make a spell attack to place a Curse on a target. Choose the Curse. On a critical miss, the target is immune for 1 hour. At the start of the target's turn, they may spend 1 AP to save (effects) against your Spell DC; a critical failure deals 1d4 Void damage.

options.label: Condemned (vs Fortitude)
options.description: On success target becomes Sapped; on critical success also Poisoned.

options.label: Paranoia (vs Will)
options.description: On success target becomes Frightened of you; on critical success also Compelled towards you.

options.label: Psychosis (vs Mental)
options.description: On success target becomes Enraged; on critical success it randomly attacks the closest target while Enraged.

options.label: Veiled (vs Mental)
options.description: On success target becomes Blinded; on critical success also Deafened.

feats.name: Essence Harvest
feats.description: If a target marked by a Curse had a soul, upon its death you regain Reservoir equal to your Tier.

feats.name: Familiar With Death
feats.description: When you cast Void spells, you may heal yourself for half of the Vitality damage dealt. Gain access to the Mortification sphere.
